description: Set up environment and verify baseline tests pass before making changes
steps: Run 'uv sync' in /projects/sandbox/maestro to install all dependencies
Run 'uv run pytest tests/ -x --ignore=tests/integration -q' to confirm all existing unit tests pass
acceptance_criteria: All existing unit tests pass (ignoring integration tests that require Docker)
findings: uv sync installed 64 packages successfully using Python 3.12.13. All 237 unit tests pass (ignoring integration tests). 1 deprecation warning about httpx/starlette testclient but no failures.
